business.geography_hint: Australia (author in country Victoria; publisher Shawline Publishing AU)

engine.ladder_reasoning: An author showcasing her book series — the books ARE the proof; visitor browses the works (series blurbs, blog, bio) to decide to buy/follow. Not selling defined expertise (trust) and no menu/place-visit decision (place).

goal.one_action: buy the featured book (Order Now) and/or sign up to the author newsletter

structure.archetype_note: Wix author site; nav shows ~12 pages (HOME/BOOKS/BIO/CONTACT/BLOG + NEWS & EVENTS, per-series subpages, plus empty 'New Page'/'Projects' stubs). Homepage aggregates 4 series blurbs; commerce is fully delegated to external publisher/BookDepository.

mapped.observed_as: IN THE SHADE OF THE MOUNTAIN (featured book blurb + Order Now)
Contract Series / Claire Lane Series / Vera Lawson Series / Roberto Zanchini Series blurbs
Sign Up (newsletter for free book offers & store discounts)
BLOG (Clunes Booktown Festival, travel-grant posts, etc.)
Order Now / International Orders external links

unmapped.observed: Book-series catalogue (a series of novels, each an ordered/standalone title with 'Also Available' / 'Also Coming Soon' status)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section expresses a browsable body-of-work / bibliography where each item is a purchasable creative title routed to an external store; forced into features/useCases here

proposed_new.name: bibliography/works-listing
proposed_new.evidence: Multiple book series + per-series subpages + a dedicated /books listing page; the site's spine is a catalogue of creative works, distinct from a gallery/portfolio of images or a product catalog with on-site checkout

components_needed: featured-book card with external buy links

confidence.why: fetch_quality=partial: /books never hydrated past nav shell (series content reconstructed from homepage) and the CONTACT sign-up is an unreadable Wix iframe embed, so exact form fields and full bibliography could not be verified. Engine/structure judgement is otherwise clear.

gap_findings: No copy engine/section cleanly models a fiction AUTHOR whose 'work' is a bibliography of purchasable books — 'work' engine fits browse-the-work intent but its portfolio sections assume images/case-studies, not titled novels routed to external stores.

Conversion is split and ambiguous: primary purchase is a REDIRECT to third-party stores (publisher + BookDepository) while a secondary newsletter form is subscribe-follow; single-one_action model can't cleanly hold two co-equal goals (buy elsewhere + subscribe).
No capability expresses an external-storefront book/product listing (buy links off-site, no on-site cart) — sits between 'catalog', 'store-badges', and 'gallery/portfolio' without matching any.
Blog + NEWS & EVENTS author-activity content is present but only 'blog' capability exists; events/appearances have no home in the taxonomy.
Capture limits (partial): unread iframe form fields prevent confirming whether CONTACT is pure newsletter vs richer contact form.
